title: Add Metric Button Disabled State and Visual Feedback
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the Add Metric button to appear clearly disabled (gray) when no metric name has been entered, so that I understand I need to type a metric name before the button becomes active (green).
description: Improve the Add Metric button's disabled state visual feedback. The button was previously light green when disabled, which was not a sufficient visual differentiator from the active green state. The button now appears gray when disabled and transitions to green when the user starts typing a metric name. A placeholder text 'Enter your metric name...' was also added to the input field.
acceptance_criteria: Add Metric button is gray when the metric name input is empty
Add Metric button turns green when the user starts typing
Button is disabled (not clickable) when gray
Input field shows placeholder text 'Enter your metric name...'
ux_changes: Add Metric button shows gray disabled state instead of light green. Transitions to green on user input. Placeholder text added to the metric name input field.
implementation_notes: The original light green disabled color did not provide enough contrast with the active green. Gray provides clear disabled affordance.
comment_summary: Product requested gray disabled state instead of light green. Developer updated colors and added placeholder text. Previous fix in MBT-320 addressed the underlying button behavior.
